news.t: Touchstone Investments Tracking for Record Active ETF Growth
Touchstone Investments Launches US Select Growth ETF Seeking to Capitalize on Domestic Opportunities

holdings.infoBox: TSEL is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.95%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 8.24%, Alphabet at 6.50%, Amazon.com at 6.44%, and Meta Platforms at 5.67%.

overview.description: The Touchstone Sands Capital US Select Growth ETF (TSEL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through a narrow portfolio of large- and mid-cap US companies with above-average revenue or earnings growth potential. Positions integrate ESG considerations. TSEL was launched on Jan 2, 2025 and is issued by Touchstone.

data.title: Touchstone Investments Tracking for Record Active ETF Growth
data.text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Touchstone Investments closes the first half of 2025 with three new ETFs, two new RIA leaders, and four fund milestones.

data.title: Touchstone Investments Launches US Select Growth ETF Seeking to Capitalize on Domestic Opportunities
data.text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Touchstone Investments today announced the launch of the Touchstone Sands Capital US Select Growth ETF (TSEL: NASDAQ).
